query.sql: SELECT COALESCE(priority, 'Unknown') as priority, COUNT(*) as count FROM pm_tasks GROUP BY priority ORDER BY CASE priority WHEN 'Critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'High' THEN 2 WHEN 'Medium' THEN 3 WHEN 'Low' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END

option.raw: const data = ctx.data?.objects || []; const colorMap = { Critical: '#e74c3c', High: '#f39c12', Medium: '#3498db', Low: '#95a5a6', Unknown: '#bdc3c7' }; const categories = data.map(r => r.priority); const values = data.map(r => Number(r.count)); const colors = data.map(r => colorMap[r.priority] || '#bdc3c7'); return { title: { text: 'Tasks by Priority', left: 'center' }, tooltip: { trigger: 'axis', axisPointer: { type: 'shadow' } }, xAxis: { type: 'category', data: categories, axisLabel: { fontWeight: 'bold' } }, yAxis: { type: 'value', name: 'Count' }, series: [{ type: 'bar', data: values.map((v, i) => ({ value: v, itemStyle: { color: colors[i] } })), barWidth: '50%', label: { show: true, position: 'top' } }] };
